meta.name: Muhammed Sahal
meta.tagline: Flutter developer crafting exceptional mobile experiences
meta.cornerLabel: FLUTTER DEVELOPER · MOBILE ENGINEER · CLEAN ARCHITECTURE

about.sectionSubtitle: Flutter developer crafting exceptional mobile experiences
about.heading: Building mobile experiences that scale & perform
bio: Flutter Developer with 4+ years of experience building and shipping production mobile apps on iOS and Android, from first MVP to apps scaled to thousands of users.

Strong in state management (BLoC, GetX, Provider, Riverpod), Firebase, and REST/GraphQL API integration, with full-stack range across Node.js and Django for end-to-end ownership. Proven track record of delivering MVPs in under a month, leading small dev teams, and mentoring junior developers.

projects.name: Sports For Life (SFL) App
projects.description: Multi-role sports platform (players, parents, academies, coaches) with live streaming, tournaments, and fan engagement. Integrated AWS IVS for interactive live streaming with real-time chat/reactions and WebSockets for live score updates.

projects.name: ShoUp
projects.description: Complete mobile app for a social fitness & wellness platform for discovering gyms/classes, booking sessions, and joining communities. Implemented Clean Architecture with a BFF layer for REST API integration.

projects.name: PassIt - AI Teaching Assistant
projects.description: Independently delivered a full MVP in 3 weeks: lesson recording, auto-transcription, Google Classroom sync, and AI-generated study guides. Built a vector-DB-backed semantic search and auto-quiz generation pipeline.

projects.name: ETG Farmers Super App
projects.description: All-in-one farmer app spanning e-commerce, social feed, chat, agro-doctor consultations, and agro-dealer connections. Integrated an LMS module and AI-powered crop error detection.

projects.name: Rapsap
projects.description: Led end-to-end development across Android, iOS, and Web, including API integration, payment gateways, and analytics.

projects.name: Dopamine.fit
projects.description: Fitness platform with LMS, real-time video calling, and personalized AI chat.

projects.name: Geofarer
projects.description: Developed a mariner-focused app with secure JWT authentication, payment processing, and KYC verification workflows.

projects.name: GetMyDoc
projects.description: Patient and doctor-facing apps with OTP login, appointment booking, in-app chat, and digital prescriptions.

componentLibrary.name: Loopi Share
componentLibrary.description: A simple way to share Instagram stories as an embedded feature within your Flutter application.

componentLibrary.name: iOS WillPop Transition Theme
componentLibrary.description: A Flutter package to solve the conflict between iOS sliding back gesture and Willpop scope.

componentLibrary.name: Flutter Health Fit
componentLibrary.description: A Flutter plugin for integrating and using Apple HealthKit and Google Fit APIs seamlessly.

componentLibrary.name: OpenAI Groupchat
componentLibrary.description: A groupchat feature where an AI bot can provide solutions for queries directly within the chat.

componentLibrary.name: Bouncing Widget
componentLibrary.description: An animated widget that bounces to grab user attention, perfect for CTAs and notifications.

componentLibrary.name: Ease Video Player
componentLibrary.description: Multi-format video player with playlists, watch history, and robust local caching for Flutter apps.

highlights: Built and shipped cross-platform Flutter apps (iOS, Android, Web) using clean architecture.
Designed and optimized REST APIs (Node.js/Express, MongoDB); applied BLoC, Provider, and Riverpod.
Built and deployed AI-powered chatbots using OpenAI GPT models with real-time interactions.
Partnered directly with clients to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
Built end-to-end Flutter apps integrated with Node.js REST APIs, MySQL, and admin dashboards.
Built custom widgets, animations, and a shared component library cutting development time.
Led a small developer team; enforced code review standards and Git workflow discipline.
Coordinated with backend and design teams to plan sprints and scope features.
Built and delivered Flutter mobile apps for e-commerce, healthcare, and service-sector clients.
Built web platforms using Django + MySQL, including custom admin panels.
Delivered Shopify websites and storefronts for e-commerce clients.
Managed client communication and project scope independently as a solo developer.
